access.label: Εύκολο μονοπάτι
access.notes: Η Φτενάγια είναι προσβάσιμη με τα πόδια από το Νημποριό/λιμάνι ή με σύντομη μετακίνηση και έχει εποχικές παροχές.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η είσοδος στη θάλασσα είναι πιο ήπια και το βάθος αυξάνει πιο σταδιακά.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 final South Aegean organized-service cleanup 2026-05-25: downgraded unsupported organized-service claim because no direct source URL is recorded; kept nearby food/parking notes only. Source follow-up pass 37 2026-05-28: direct AllOverGreece beach page supports Ftenagia beach identity/location on Halki. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Small-island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Halki records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece and Hellenic Travel Group sources support identity/location and recorded access/terrain/service context. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.
